canonical_question: Under what authority may the system act, and what must never be allowed?
supporting_repos_or_surfaces: socioprophet; human-digital-twin; organizations governance docs; safeguarding docs
maturity_now: Policy control repo exists but is not yet the canonical portfolio anchor
target_90d: Cross-surface governance language and policy control aligned
primary_gate: Policy bundle validation green and approval-rule coverage
leading_metrics: policy bundle validation pass rate; surface trust-boundary coverage; approval-rule coverage; policy inconsistency count
main_risks: doctrine packaging confusion; policy repo not yet treated as portfolio anchor; uneven surface language
next_two_steps: Make policy-fabric explicit in the canonical narrative; align public governance docs to policy bundle semantics

canonical_question: What makes cross-system behavior reproducible, reviewable, and hard to dispute?
maturity_now: Strong repo posture, still needs explicit adoption profile
target_12m: Cross-language parity and evidence artifacts enforced across anchor repos
primary_gate: v1 parity green and replay artifacts emitted on consequential workflows
leading_metrics: fixture parity rate; replay artifact completeness; cross-language verification rate
main_risks: v1/vNext confusion; uneven downstream binding adoption
next_two_steps: Freeze v1 adoption profile; define downstream conformance checklist

canonical_question: How does work move from intent to controlled execution and back into review?
maturity_now: Architecturally strong with a real cloud-edge runtime seed
target_90d: One visible operating model published and measured across core and cloud-edge lanes
target_12m: Lifecycle evidence and promotion-reversal gates wired into release trains
primary_gate: All primary execution paths emit validation, placement, run, replay, and lifecycle artifacts
leading_metrics: bundle validation pass rate; lock drift incidents; lifecycle artifact coverage; placement policy coverage
main_risks: scope creep into generic agent platform language; cloud-edge packaging underweighted; unclear operator maturity tiers
next_two_steps: Bind cloudshell-fog into the execution-plane story; connect lifecycle artifacts to release governance dashboard

plane_name: Identity, Entity, and Human API Surfaces
canonical_question: How does the platform represent people and entities without collapsing safety, consent, proof, and recovery?
supporting_repos_or_surfaces: Entity Analytics docs; Digital Trust surface; policy-fabric
maturity_now: Conceptually strong with an active Digital Trust surface, but contracts remain fragmented
target_90d: Shared packaging language across HDT, Entity Analytics, and Digital Trust
target_12m: Pinned contracts and explainable proof-export model used by downstream surfaces
release_source_of_truth: HDT contracts + entity analytics schema/service releases
primary_gate: Merge, export, proof, and routing rules are explicit and testable
leading_metrics: proof artifact coverage; safe export test pass rate; merge-unmerge explainability coverage; identity route coherence
main_risks: HDT/entity split staying conceptual; digital trust underpackaged
next_two_steps: Treat Digital Trust as an active surface, not a future note; specify shared proof-export and recovery contract families

canonical_question: How does the platform produce security value without becoming a misuse amplifier?
maturity_now: Public boundary is clear, but policy and runtime operationalization are still split
target_12m: Restricted operator workflow and evidence model operationalized without public leakage
primary_gate: Every defensive workflow has explicit authorization and policy-evidence path
leading_metrics: authorization coverage; evidence-bearing remediation ratio; public-restricted leak count; defensive policy alignment rate
main_risks: misinterpretation as offensive platform; policy-runtime split creating control gaps; public docs oversharing or undersharing
next_two_steps: Bind defensive flows to policy contracts; define restricted operator interface contract

leading_metrics: promotion-governance pass rate; intake-to-qualified-deployment conversion; automation integrity checks
